danger_signals.visual_form: Tiles accumulating in the playfield well, approaching top boundary
danger_signals.meaning: Game over condition approaching; player is losing control of tile placement

danger_signals.visual_form: Paddle holding maximum five tiles with no space for new tiles
danger_signals.meaning: Immediate danger of drops; tiles will fall off conveyor uncaught

danger_signals.visual_form: Colored tile sliding past paddle off the bottom of conveyor belt

danger_signals.meaning: Limited remaining mistakes before game over

safety_signals.visual_form: Unfilled columns in the five-column well grid
safety_signals.meaning: Player has room to place tiles; game state remains sustainable

safety_signals.visual_form: Three or more matching colored tiles aligned horizontally/vertically/diagonally disappear with visual feedback
safety_signals.meaning: Successful puzzle solving; tiles removed, well space freed, points awarded

safety_signals.visual_form: Paddle display showing fewer than five tiles
safety_signals.meaning: Player can safely catch incoming tiles

safety_signals.visual_form: Cascading Klaxes or multi-tile line completions with point display
safety_signals.meaning: Player performing well; multiple Klaxes from single tile action

faction_indicators.symbol_or_sigil: Tengen logo on title screen (regional variants: Hudson Soft logo in JP version)
faction_indicators.environmental_markers: Title screen branding varies by region; US/KR version uses Tengen font; JP version uses Hudson Soft branding in Tengen font

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Level select screen presents three wave options; player chooses progression difficulty
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Tile speed and complexity increase with wave selection; later waves award bonus points but increase challenge

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Drop counter resets to zero after every fifth wave; fresh opportunity presented
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Player receives three wave options to continue; gameplay intensity scales with choice

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Well gradually fills or empties based on player success; tile speed increases gradually
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Tiles advance down conveyor belt at variable rates; paddle controls tile placement timing

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Either: well completely full, all drops exhausted, or all 100 waves completed
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Game terminates; final score tallied with bonus points for remaining well capacity and conveyor tiles

world_state_to_visual.visual_manifestation: Tiles remaining on conveyor or empty well spaces visible at wave completion
world_state_to_visual.behavioral_manifestation: Bonus points awarded for tile count and well efficiency, incentivizing efficient clearing

environmental_storytelling.example: Tiles descend on a conveyor belt visual, establishing time pressure and inevitable progression; paddle at bottom represents player's singular point of intervention
Five-column, five-row well grid visually demonstrates space management puzzle; full well signals game failure, creating spatial pressure narrative
Multiple colored tile types create color-matching gameplay; visual repetition of color patterns trains player pattern recognition for Klax formations
Joystick down accelerates tile motion; visual speed increase communicates player agency in tempo control

entity_behavioral_tells.behavior: Advance downward at base speed; player can accelerate with joystick down; player can flip upward with joystick up to reposition
Moves left/right via joystick; holds up to five tiles; pressing button drops topmost tile into well; full paddle blocks new catches
Tiles stack downward; full columns prevent tile placement; tiles fall when matches clear above them; cascade effects create bonus opportunities
Decrements when tile falls uncaught; resets every fifth wave; game over when exhausted; visual indicator shows remaining tolerance for error

notes: Klax is a pure puzzle game with minimal narrative, faction, or political world-state communication. Visual communication focuses entirely on game state clarity: danger through spatial constraints (well filling), safety through open space and successful pattern completion. Regional differences (title screen logos, button mapping for JP Famicom) reflect publisher identity rather than world-state variation. The game uses abstract colored tiles and geometric well space—no environmental storytelling or faction visual identity systems. Manifestation layer is entirely mechanical/puzzle-state focused rather than narrative or political.
